name: pay.sh agent skills
description: Repeatable workflows for agents using pay.sh, Pay MCP, and the pay-skills registry.

skills.name: pay-for-api
skills.title: Pay for an API
skills.description: Discover a provider, inspect endpoints, and make one wallet-approved HTTP 402 API call.

skills.name: discover-provider
skills.title: Discover a provider
skills.description: Search the pay-skills registry by task and choose a gateway URL without swapping in upstream URLs.

skills.name: configure-pay-mcp
skills.title: Configure Pay MCP
skills.description: Attach the local Pay MCP server to an MCP-capable agent client.

skills.name: accept-api-payments
skills.title: Accept API payments
skills.description: Run a payment gateway, expose metered endpoints, and test sandbox payment flows.

skills.name: publish-provider
skills.title: Publish a provider
skills.description: Create and validate provider metadata so agents can discover a payment-ready gateway.
